title: Phunware Reports Third Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: Phunware Reports Third Quarter 2022 Financial Results. Key Financial Metrics: Third Quarter 2022 Results: Net Revenues: $4.8 million. MaaS Platform Revenues: $1.3 million. Hardware Revenues: $3.5 million. Net Loss: $(8.0) million. Net Loss per Share: $(0.08). Non-GAAP Adjusted EBITDA Loss: $(6.7) million. Notable Statement: CEO Alan S. Knitowski commented: We are very excited to continue our 2022 momentum in Q3, delivering actual revenues exceeding 120% growth year-over-year. Forward Guidance: The company revised its 2022 revenue outlook to approximately $22.5 million, representing roughly 225% year-over-year growth.
